Fact: No other Pokémon has the same type combination as Alolan Sandslash and its Alolan pre-evolved form.
In the Pokémon Red and Blue beta, Sandslash's original name was "Sandstorm".

Sandslash and its pre-evolved form both share their category with Rattata, Raticate, Pikachu, Raichu, Pawmi, and Pawmo. They are all known as the Mouse Pokémon, though Rattata and Raticate were originally called the Rat Pokémon prior to Generation III.

Alolan Sandslash can be seen as a parallel to Alolan Ninetales. Both are Ice-type Alolan forms of Generation I Pokémon that are part of a two-stage evolution line, and both evolve via an Ice Stone; Alolan Sandslash is exclusive to Moon, Ultra Moon, and Violet, while Alolan Sandslash is exclusive to Sun, Ultra Sun, and Scarlet.
